description: Evaluation cases for OSPool HTCondor job scaffolding skill

evals.prompt: I want to run a parameter sweep for my model on the Open Science Grid. Generate an HTCondor submit file.
behavior: Generates HTCondor submit file with parameter sweep configuration

output.description: HTCondor submit file with parameter sweep configuration

evals.prompt: I'm running a large sensitivity analysis with 50 agents × 10 patches × 5 random seeds on OSG. Generate HTCondor configuration.
behavior: Generates HTCondor submit + job expansion logic

evals.prompt: My model has large input files (100 MB each). Set up HTCondor with proper file staging.
behavior: Generates submit file with staging + data access strategy

output.description: Submit file with staging + data access strategy

evals.prompt: Generate a Slurm batch script for my HPC cluster
How can I run thousands of independent simulations efficiently across distributed resources?
Fix my HTCondor submit file that is failing to transfer input files
behavior: Debugs submit file with corrected transfer directives

output.description: Debugged submit file with corrected transfer directives

evals.prompt: Validate whether my HTCondor workflow is configured correctly
behavior: Validates HTCondor workflow and suggests fixes

output.description: Validation report with configuration issues and fixes

evals.prompt: Run my simulation script locally with bash
Optimize my Slurm job for faster execution

behavior: Clarifies workflow and produces HTCondor solution

output.description: Clarifies workflow and produces HTCondor solution

evals.prompt: Generate a PBS job script for my distributed simulation
I need to run 20,000 independent jobs with different parameters
behavior: Suggests HTCondor parameter sweep or DAG strategy

output.description: HTCondor parameter sweep or DAG strategy

evals.prompt: Fix formatting issues in my HTCondor submit file
Run my simulation on a Kubernetes cluster
Prepare my simulation for publication and also generate HTCondor jobs
behavior: Handles HTCondor part only; does not overreach into FAIR

output.description: Handles HTCondor part only; does not overreach into FAIR

evals.prompt: My jobs keep getting evicted on OSPool. How should I handle this?
behavior: Suggests checkpointing/restart strategy and job robustness guidance

output.description: Checkpointing/restart strategy and job robustness guidance
